channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/3/4)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈挺热闹的，尤其是围绕“AI编程”和“智能体（Agent）”的讨论和实践非常多。我发现有几个方向特别值得你留意：一是关于“AI写代码，谁来审查”的深度讨论又热起来了；二是出现了几个能直接连接你本地AI编程工具（比如Cursor）到聊天平台的新奇项目；三是关于“万物皆Agent”的平台工程趋势，有人做了很棒的总结。另外，还有一些实用的工具，比如帮你管理AI服务账号的、提升代码理解准确率的，都挺有意思的。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈挺热闹的，尤其是围绕“AI编程”和“智能体（Agent）”的讨论和实践非常多。我发现有几个方向特别值得你留意：一是关于“AI写代码，谁来审查”的深度讨论又热起来了；二是出现了几个能直接连接你本地AI编程工具（比如Cursor）到聊天平台的新奇项目；三是关于“万物皆Agent”的平台工程趋势，有人做了很棒的总结。另外，还有一些实用的工具，比如帮你管理AI服务账号的、提升代码理解准确率的，都挺有意思的。

item.title: ForLoopCodes/contextplus
item.description: Semantic Intelligence for Large-Scale Engineering. Context+ is an MCP server designed for developers who demand 99% accuracy. By combining RAG, Tree-sitter AST, Spectral Clustering, and Obsidian-style linking, Context+ turns a massive codebase into a searchable, hierarchical feature graph. | 近期热门 | 总 1302 stars
item.author: ForLoopCodes

item.title: World-Open-Graph/br-acc
item.description: World Transparency Graph public codebase (🚧 website in progress) | 近期热门 | 总 1196 stars
item.author: World-Open-Graph

item.title: open-pencil/open-pencil
item.description: AI-native design editor. Open-source Figma alternative. | 近期热门 | 总 1024 stars
item.author: open-pencil

item.title: chenhg5/cc-connect
item.description: Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms. | 近期热门 | 总 294 stars
item.author: chenhg5

item.title: geekjourneyx/jina-cli
item.description: A lightweight CLI tool wrapping Jina AI Reader API for AI Agents. Fetch and parse any URL into LLM-friendly formats (Markdown/Text/HTML). Perfect for reading X(Twitter), blogs, and news sites. | 近期热门 | 总 198 stars
item.author: geekjourneyx

item.title: ierror/synaps-cad
item.description: The AI-powered 3D CAD IDE — edit code, visualize in 3D, and reshape your designs with natural language. | 近期热门 | 总 184 stars
item.author: ierror

item.title: 170-carry/codex-tools
item.description: 快捷切换codex 账号以及监控codex用量的工具 | 近期热门 | 总 152 stars
item.author: 170-carry

item.title: lovisdotio/falsprite
item.description: Generate animated sprite sheets from a text prompt. Powered by Nano-banana-2, BRIA & OpenRouter on fal.ai, one API key. | 近期热门 | 总 141 stars
item.author: lovisdotio

item.title: siewers/shield-commander
item.description: A desktop app for managing NVIDIA Shield devices over ADB — monitor processes, install/uninstall apps, and view system details | 近期热门 | 总 33 stars
item.author: siewers

item.title: SuperMoney - 您的财务压力，由AI解决。
item.author: SuperMoney
